programme.desc: For DIRT’s first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It’s all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT’s past adventures.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The CIA has called again, and Don has answered the call on behalf of the A-team. A team of special operatives are needed for a highly classified peace mission that could turn deadly at a moment's notice. To spearhead their mission training efforts, the team hits the range with some state-of-the-art SIRT pistols. Then, the gloves are off and the team gets their first course of fire for the season. After the fun course of fire, the team switches gears to knife throwing and fire building, with the help of Top Knives. It’s safe to say, these All-stars aren’t waiting a second.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The Glove Returns with a vengeance! This crop of contestants is the best of the best.. but how do they stack up against The Glove? Where about to find out. After The Glove waves goodbye, it’s hot-headed friend makes a debut courtesy of Exothermic Technologies. The contestants have a hard time keeping a smile off their faces as they shoot at targets and then blow them up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Competitors Stephen and Danny sit down to recap the best and worst moments so far in the season. Also, Chris and Cindy sit down with Compliant Technologies’ founder to get the backstory on how the innovative product that is sweeping the nation (and terrorizing the contestants) came to be. Then Dr. West drops some truth bombs on the state of the average human body’s blood.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: In the season finale of All Stars 3, the contestants’ hard work throughout the competition is put to the ultimate test. With tensions in the Middle East reaching a boiling point, the CIA assigns the All-Stars an executive protection mission for a key negotiator. However, before the team can deploy, escalating terrorist activity dramatically raises the threat level. Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. When they're caught on the X with no clear way out, there's only one option left—eliminate the threat. Who will survive the mission? And who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: High Lonesome 1950, John Drew Barrymore
programme.desc: A young drifter accused of murder must prove his innocence while being hunted across the frontier by a determined posse

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: Rawhide Terror (1934)
programme.desc: A cowboy becomes the target of suspicion after a series of crimes are committed near a local ranch, forcing him to uncover the real culprits while protecting his name and bringing the outlaws to justice

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.

programme.title: North of Arizona
programme.desc: Perrin is a cowboy who comes to the aid of local Indians being swindled out of their gold. He signs on as a ranch foreman, but learns the ranch is the home of the crooks.

programme.title: Honor of the Range
programme.desc: After Sheriff Ken puts money in the safe, his brother Clem gives Rawhide the combination. With the money gone the disgruntled townsmen make Boots Sheriff and lock up Ken. Clem, now a prisoner of Rawhide, has a change of heart and sends Ken a message with the outlaw's location. Ken escapes by impersonating the saloon entertainer and rides for the hangout.

programme.desc: Embark on an out-of-this-world journey to Roswell, New Mexico! Unveil intriguing alien mysteries, order from a McDonald's with a secret menu and stay the night in a Cold War missile bunker. Don't miss this extraordinary adventure!

programme.title: Sports Town Stories: Family Drives Pittsburgh Athletes to Excel
programme.desc: From swimmers fueled by loved ones' unconditional support, to basketball and field hockey siblings driving each other toward greatness, see how family and sports are intertwined in the 'Burgh.

programme.title: Plate It! Sacramento: Going Gourmet
programme.desc: Pop the champagne: we’re getting fancy! Will Chef Polo Adamo incorporate the caviar more creatively than Chef Dennis Sydnor? It's anybody's gourmet guess.

programme.title: Local Love: A Second Chance At Love
programme.desc: Divorcee and single mom Kristen, is ready to get back out there and find a romantic connection. She’ll explore a tabletop board game bar, bowl a few games, and throw some axes as she dates around Kansas City.

programme.title: Human Race By Runner’s World, Vol 2
programme.desc: Runner-in-Chief Jeff Dengate, presents inspiring runner stories from around the country. Meet runners from Colorado, New Jersey, Kentucky and Pennsylvania who are making a difference.
